test-method.name: verifyWhetherUserIsAbleToSaveInformationsOnAdminUser
test-method.description: Verify that the user is able to saves the admin user details successfully when valid data is entered and the Save button is clicked

test-method.name: verifyWhetherUserIsAbleToSaveInformationsOnAdminUser
test-method.description: Verify that the user is able to saves the admin user details successfully when valid data is entered and the Save button is clicked

test-method.name: verifyWhetherUserIsAbleToSaveInformationsOnAdminUser
test-method.description: Verify that the user is able to saves the admin user details successfully when valid data is entered and the Save button is clicked
